MIZZO Endo 4000 Advanced Surgical Robotic System

MIZZO Endo 4000 · Surgical Robotic Systems

Cutting-edge robotic-assisted surgery system with open console design, versatile arm cart, and universal vision cart for enhanced precision and patient outcomes

MaterialMedical grade materials for robotic components

Frequently Asked Questions

Cutting-edge robotic-assisted surgery system with open console design, versatile arm cart, and universal vision cart for enhanced precision and patient outcomes

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the MIZZO Endo 4000 Advanced Surgical Robotic System, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The MIZZO Endo 4000 Advanced Surgical Robotic System is constructed using Medical grade materials for robotic components, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
